driAgentGuilmon.title: Guilmon (DRI Jimmy)
driAgentGuilmon.description: Add Guilmon to your Digimon party

requisites.partyLevel: Have a party level between 30 and 45

1.description: Look for Dri Jimmy in Seiryu City

2.description: Defeat WarGrowlmon in battle to receive Guilmon's DDNA

3.description: Deliver Guilmon's DNA to DRI Jimmy
